name: chat-actions-strip
description: Theme-aware translucent action bar widget for AGNT chat responses (regenerate, copy, share/upload, thumbs up/down).
author: AGNT User

schema.title: Chat Actions Strip
schema.description: Returns an AGNT-styled translucent action strip widget for use at the bottom of a chat output.

content.description: Content used for Copy/Share payloads. If empty, Copy will copy regeneratePrompt instead.

regeneratePrompt.description: What the Regenerate button copies to clipboard (simple, reliable).

shareWebhookUrl.description: Optional webhook URL. If provided, Share/Upload will POST JSON {content, meta} to this URL using agnt.fetch (auth proxied).

feedbackWebhookUrl.description: Optional webhook URL. If provided, Thumbs Up/Down will POST JSON {vote, content, meta}.

showFeedback.description: Whether to show thumbs up/down buttons.

density.description: Controls spacing/size of the action strip.

hint.description: Optional hint text shown on the right side (e.g., 'Actions').
